summary: Phase 21B Assessment V2 implementation testing completed. All backend endpoints working correctly (17/17 tests passed). Frontend features verified: Admin can view session details with SessionDetailModal, Client can access and fill assessments via AssessmentV2Taking page with domain navigation, 8 question types support, auto-save, and submit functionality.

minor_warnings.issue: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <option>
minor_warnings.impact: Console warning only, no functional impact

passed_tests: 'Lihat Jawaban' button appears in AdminAssessments page
'Laporan AI' tab hidden for draft sessions (correct behavior)
Domain navigator sidebar displays with progress
Question cards render with proper question types
Frontend compiles with warnings only (no errors)

phase_21b_features_verified: Backend engine supports both 'domains' and 'sections' format in templates
New auth-based endpoints: GET /sessions/{id}/detail, PATCH /sessions/{id}/answers, POST /sessions/{id}/submit
AI report generation endpoints: POST /sessions/{id}/generate-report, GET /sessions/{id}/report
SessionDetailModal with tabs for 'Jawaban' and 'Laporan AI'
AssessmentV2Taking page with domain navigator, 8 question types, auto-save, submit dialog
additional_features_verified: Progress tracking per domain and overall
Submitted session banner with PDF download
